steps.t: Green grass grows all over the rocky plains of Eorlsmead. You should collect bundles of grass to feed to the horses of Stangard.
The horses of Stangard are in the stables of the city. You should bring the grass you collected to Tatwine.
Tatwine is in Stangard. You should speak with Tatwine now that you have provided the horses with a better meal.
